subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Whose bounties encompass all, Whose signs have been manifest, Whose banners have been raised aloft, and from Whose clouds of grace abundance doth flow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی احاطت فیوضاته و ظهرت ایاته و ارتفعت رایاته و فاضت من غمام فضله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
